incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. We need 3 full symbols and 1 half-symbol for 7 sightings.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Each symbol stands for 2 sightings. So 3 full symbols give us 6, then we need 1 more—that's the half-symbol.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System places 3 full symbols plus 1 half-symbol in Birds row

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. I'll place 3 full symbols—that's 6 sightings. Then I add 1 half-symbol for the last sighting. Three and a half symbols shows 7 total.
